title: Lamb Mechoui Tacos
description: A unique fusion of Japanese and Moroccan flavors in a taco. Tender lamb mechoui is served with spicy Japanese mayo and crispy sesame seeds.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Slice the lamb mechoui into thin strips.
Grill the lamb for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm the taco shells according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, mix together the spicy Japanese mayo, soy sauce, and red pepper flakes.
Spoon the lamb onto the taco shells, followed by a dollop of the spicy mayo mixture.
Garnish with cilantro, crushed sesame seeds, and a drizzle of sesame oil.
